briefdescription.para: default types for receptor AliphaticCarbonXSHydrophobe AliphaticCarbonXSNonHydrophobe AromaticCarbonXSHydrophobe AromaticCarbonXSNonHydrophobe Bromine Iodine Chlorine Fluorine Nitrogen NitrogenXSAcceptor NitrogenXSDonor NitrogenXSDonorAcceptor Oxygen OxygenXSAcceptor OxygenXSDonorAcceptor OxygenXSDonor Sulfur SulfurAcceptor Phosphorus Calcium Zinc GenericMetal Boron Manganese Magnesium Iron

default types for ligand AliphaticCarbonXSHydrophobe AliphaticCarbonXSNonHydrophobe AromaticCarbonXSHydrophobe AromaticCarbonXSNonHydrophobe Bromine Iodine Chlorine Fluorine Nitrogen NitrogenXSAcceptor NitrogenXSDonor NitrogenXSDonorAcceptor Oxygen OxygenXSAcceptor OxygenXSDonorAcceptor OxygenXSDonor Sulfur SulfurAcceptor Phosphorus GenericMetal Boron Manganese Magnesium Zinc Calcium Iron

memberdef.argsstring: (1, LIBMOLGRID_MAX_GRID_DIM, EXPAND_GRID_DEFINITIONS, 0)
memberdef.name: BOOST_PP_REPEAT_FROM_TO

memberdef.argsstring: (float3 origin, float resolution, float x, float y, float z)

memberdef.name: grid2cart

memberdef.argsstring: (std::istream &in)
memberdef.name: read_dx

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &fname)
memberdef.name: read_dx

briefdescription.para: read dx grid from file name

memberdef.argsstring: (std::istream &in, Grid< Dtype, 3 > &grid)
memberdef.name: read_dx

briefdescription.para: Read dx formatted grid into provided grid, which must have the correct dimensions.

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &fname, Grid< Dtype, 3 > &grid)
memberdef.name: read_dx

briefdescription.para: read dx grid from file name

memberdef.argsstring: (std::istream &in, G &grid)
memberdef.name: read_bin

briefdescription.para: read in binary file, grid must be correct size

memberdef.argsstring: (std::ostream &out, const Grid< DType, 3 > &grid, const float3 &center, float resolution, float scale=1.0)
memberdef.name: write_dx

briefdescription.para: output grid as dx formatted file Values are multiplied by scale, which may be necessary to adjust for limited precision in the text-based format

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &fname, const Grid< DType, 3 > &grid, const float3 &center, float resolution, float scale)
memberdef.name: write_dx

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &prefix, const std::vector< std::string > &names, const Grid< Dtype, 4 > &grid, const float3 &center, float resolution, float scale=1.0)
memberdef.name: write_dx_grids

briefdescription.para: Output multiple grids using type names as a suffix.

parameterdescription.para: must have same size as first dimension of grid
multiply each value by this factor

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &prefix, const std::vector< std::string > &names, Grid< Dtype, 4 > &grid)
memberdef.name: read_dx_grids

briefdescription.para: Read multiple grids using type names as a suffix. Grids must be correctly sized.

parameterdescription.para: must have same size as first dimension of grid

memberdef.argsstring: (std::ostream &out, const Grid< DType, 3 > &grid, const float3 &center, float resolution, float scale=1.0)
memberdef.name: write_map

briefdescription.para: output grid as autodock map formatted file

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &fname, const Grid< DType, 3 > &grid, const float3 &center, float resolution, float scale)
memberdef.name: write_map

memberdef.argsstring: (std::ostream &out, const G &grid)
memberdef.name: write_bin
